chapter_title.en: The Seventy-Fourth Assembly, the Assembly of Tuesday, the Twelfth of Jumada al-Ukhra, 368 AH.

text: 5 - وبهذا الاسناد قال: كان الصادق (عليه السلام) كثيرا ما يقول: علم المحجة واضح لمريده * * وأرى القلوب عن المحجة في عمى ولقد عجبت لهالك ونجاته * * موجودة، ولقد عجبت لمن نجا (4)

en.bilal-muhammad: By this isnad, he said: Al-Sadiq (as) would frequently say: The knowledge of the plain is clear for him who seeks it But I see the hearts are blinded from the plain, I am astonished at him who perishes when his salvation is present, And I am astonished at him who is saved [despite the plenitude of those who perish].
